Big Five Records · 2025/26
Most Dribbles Ending in a Shot
24 dribbles ending in a shot in the Big Five leagues — only Lamine Yamal recorded more (26).
Most Dribbles by a Defender
70 successful dribbles in 2025/26 — at least 7 more than any other defender in the Big Five European leagues.
Top Dribble-to-Shot Rate
12.4% dribble-to-shot success rate — highest among all defenders in 2025/26 Serie A. Also led all Big Five defenders in final-third ball recoveries (15, level with Nico Williams).
Preferred Playing Position

Marco Palestra primarily excels as a Right-Back, Left-Back or Right Wing-Back, utilizing his exceptional engine to cover the entire flank. His versatility allows him to seamlessly transition between defensive duties and providing offensive width and support.

Attacking Full-Back
Known for his overlapping runs and ability to deliver dangerous crosses into the box, constantly stretching opposition defences.
Defensive Solidity
Strong in one-on-one duels and provides reliable cover on the right side of defense, winning 60% of all duels contested.
High Stamina
Consistent work rate allows him to maintain high performance levels throughout matches — a key reason behind his 37 Serie A appearances this season.
